trajectory.reasoning: WHAT YOU FOUND: Staff note dated Jan 13, 2026 states 'BUNDLE ORDER REFUND: Customer purchased 3-item bundle... Wants to return 1 defective item. Policy: Bundle discounts apply to full set. Technical answer: Deny (breaks bundle). HOWEVER: Customer is reasonable, 18 orders, item IS defective (confirmed)'. WHERE YOU FOUND IT: Order view page under 'Comments History' section (visible in page content as 'Jan 13, 2026 6:22:18 AM Complete Customer Not Notified' followed by the note). WHY IT MATTERS: The staff note explicitly confirms the item was defective, which requires physical delivery to have occurred. This directly contradicts the customer's claim of 'Package was never delivered', proving the refund request is based on false pretenses.
